title: OCGN Stock Quote and News on CNBC
text: CNBC stock quotes and news coverage of Ocugen Inc. Real-time stock data and news feed. Latest news: Frequent coverage of clinical trial announcements and regulatory milestones. CNBC analysts discuss gene therapy market opportunity. Commentary on capital raising activities and shareholder dilution. Market sentiment: Mixed throughout 2024-2025 with positive bias toward clinical data and negative bias toward financing dilution. Interviews: Company executives discuss clinical programs and regulatory strategy. Discussion of gene therapy competitive landscape. Comments on pricing strategy for potential approvals. Market correlation: OCGN shows high correlation with broader biotech indices but exhibits greater volatility due to binary clinical outcomes.
